description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot bordered by a low wall and landscaped with grass and trees. The structure features a flat roof design, large windows, and a mix of white and dark exterior finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front includes a paved driveway leading to a garage and a covered entrance, while the rear showcases a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and outdoor seating. The layout is open and sprawling, with multiple wings and courtyards visible, suggesting a focus on indoor-outdoor living. Several cars are parked in the driveway, and the property is surrounded by a manicured lawn with scattered trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a driveway, garage, and a backyard pool, set in a landscaped rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, garage, and the transition from driveway to backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, patio, outdoor seating, and extensive windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and a partial view of the pool and backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
